---
title: "Intern Experience"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## HengXin constrcution technology and testing co.LTD
Time and location: June 2023 - July 2023  Suzhou \
Job Duties:\
1. make the materials for testing and help carry out the process of the tests\
2. record the testing data and analyse whether materials meet the standard\

## Wing Investment
Time and location:Jan 2024 - Feb 2024  Suzhou \
Job Duties:\
1. conduct the research about the targeted industry \
2. have interviews with the leaders and customers of the targeted company\
3. organize the meetings contents and make some reports\
4. join in the discussion about the potential of corresponding firms\
